scripts.db:generate: cd apps/api && dotenv -e .env -- pnpx ts-node -P ./tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register ../../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:generate -d ./src/data-source.ts ./src/migrations/migration
scripts.db:push: cd apps/api && dotenv -e .env -- pnpx ts-node -P ./tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register ../../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d ./src/data-source.ts
scripts.db:generate-production: cd apps/api && dotenv -e .env.production -- pnpx ts-node -P ./tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register ../../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:generate -d ./src/data-source.ts ./src/migrations/migration
scripts.db:push-production: cd apps/api && dotenv -e .env.production -- pnpx ts-node -P ./tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register ../../node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d ./src/data-source.ts
